name: Darling
description: A heartfelt romance that blossoms unexpectedly between two strangers in the quiet lanes of a coastal town.

name: Ante Sundaraniki
description: A charming rom-com about an inter-religious couple navigating the chaos of planning their wedding behind their parents' backs.

name: OG
description: A high-octane action thriller about an undercover agent who infiltrates the most dangerous criminal syndicate in South Asia.

name: War
description: An Indian agent is assigned to eliminate his former mentor who has gone rogue, but nothing is what it seems.

name: Nagavalli
description: A psychiatrist encounters a mysterious patient who claims to be possessed by the ghost of a classical dancer from decades past.

name: Radhe Shyam
description: A palm reader who does not believe in love falls for a passionate young woman in a sweeping 1970s European backdrop.

name: Chandramukhi
description: A psychiatrist investigates the mystery of a haunted mansion and uncovers a centuries-old tragedy rooted in betrayal and love.

name: Masooda
description: A raw and terrifying story of a single mother and her daughter haunted by a demonic entity from their past.
